requirement_topic.en: EMC Compliance — INTN NP Standards Harmonised with IEC CISPR / Mercosur NM Norms
requirement_topic.zh: EMC合规——INTN NP标准（与IEC CISPR及Mercosur NM规范协调）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC合規——INTN NP標準（與IEC CISPR及Mercosur NM規範協調）

summary.en: Paraguay requires electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) compliance for electrical and electronic equipment, including wireless and IoT devices, under NP (Norma Paraguaya) standards administered by the INTN (Instituto Nacional de Tecnología, Normalización y Metrología). Many INTN NP standards are harmonised with IEC/ISO and Mercosur NM (Norma Mercosur) norms, which in turn draw on IEC CISPR standards for EMC (e.g., CISPR 32 for multimedia equipment emissions, CISPR 35 for immunity, and related standards). As a Mercosur member, Paraguay participates in the Mercosur technical standardisation system alongside Brazil, Argentina, and Uruguay. EMC test evidence is typically submitted as part of the CONATEL homologación technical dossier. Separate INTN certification for EMC compliance may be required depending on the product category and applicable NP standard. Test reports from internationally accredited laboratories (ILAC-accredited) are generally acceptable.
summary.zh: 巴拉圭依据由INTN（国家技术、标准化与计量院）管理的NP（巴拉圭国家标准）标准，要求包括无线及物联网设备在内的电气和电子设备符合电磁兼容性（EMC）要求。许多INTN NP标准与IEC/ISO及Mercosur NM（Mercosur规范）协调，而后者又援引了IEC CISPR EMC标准（如多媒体设备辐射的CISPR 32、抗扰度的CISPR 35及相关标准）。作为Mercosur成员，巴拉圭与巴西、阿根廷和乌拉圭共同参与Mercosur技术标准化体系。EMC检测证据通常作为CONATEL型式认可技术文件的组成部分提交。根据产品类别和适用NP标准，可能还须取得INTN针对EMC合规的单独认证。经国际认可实验室（ILAC认可）出具的检测报告通常可被接受。
summary.zht: 巴拉圭依據由INTN（國家技術、標準化與計量院）管理的NP（巴拉圭國家標準）標準，要求包括無線及物聯網裝置在內的電氣和電子設備符合電磁相容性（EMC）要求。許多INTN NP標準與IEC/ISO及Mercosur NM（Mercosur規範）協調，而後者又援引了IEC CISPR EMC標準（如多媒體設備輻射的CISPR 32、抗擾度的CISPR 35及相關標準）。作為Mercosur成員，巴拉圭與巴西、阿根廷和烏拉圭共同參與Mercosur技術標準化體系。EMC檢測證據通常作為CONATEL型式認可技術文件的組成部分提交。根據產品類別和適用NP標準，可能還須取得INTN針對EMC合規的單獨認證。經國際認可實驗室（ILAC認可）出具的檢測報告通常可被接受。

standards_or_laws: INTN NP standards — Norma Paraguaya standards administered by the Instituto Nacional de Tecnología, Normalización y Metrología; many harmonised with IEC/ISO and Mercosur NM norms
Mercosur NM (Norma Mercosur) — regional technical norms harmonised across Paraguay, Brazil, Argentina, and Uruguay; draw on IEC CISPR for EMC
IEC CISPR 32 — Multimedia equipment electromagnetic emissions standard (basis for Mercosur/NP harmonisation)
IEC CISPR 35 — Multimedia equipment electromagnetic immunity standard (basis for Mercosur/NP harmonisation)

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for wireless and consumer electronics is covered under the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme administered by CNCA, which references GB/T EMC standards derived from IEC CISPR (e.g., GB/T 9254 series for emissions, GB/T 17618 for immunity). MIIT SRRC approval also addresses certain radio-layer electromagnetic parameters. Chinese GB/T EMC standards are technically related to IEC CISPR but are not identical to NP or Mercosur NM standards, and CCC is not recognised in Paraguay.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备和消费电子产品的EMC合规在由CNCA管理的CCC（中国强制认证）体系下覆盖，引用了源自IEC CISPR的GB/T EMC标准（如辐射的GB/T 9254系列、抗扰度的GB/T 17618）。MIIT SRRC核准也涉及部分无线层面的电磁参数。中国GB/T EMC标准与IEC CISPR技术上相关，但与NP或Mercosur NM标准不完全相同，且CCC不被巴拉圭承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線裝置和消費電子產品的EMC合規在由CNCA管理的CCC（中國強制認證）體系下覆蓋，引用了源自IEC CISPR的GB/T EMC標準（如輻射的GB/T 9254系列、抗擾度的GB/T 17618）。MIIT SRRC核准也涉及部分無線層面的電磁參數。中國GB/T EMC標準與IEC CISPR技術上相關，但與NP或Mercosur NM標準不完全相同，且CCC不被巴拉圭承認。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — covers EMC for consumer electronics in China under CNCA
GB/T 9254 series — Chinese EMC emissions standards for information technology equipment (derived from IEC CISPR 32/22)
GB/T 17618 — Chinese EMC immunity standard for information technology equipment (derived from IEC CISPR 35/24)

gap.en: CCC EMC certification is not recognised in Paraguay. INTN NP and Mercosur NM EMC standards apply; while they are harmonised with IEC CISPR, the specific NP versions and applicable test parameters should be verified with a qualified regulatory professional. EMC test evidence from ILAC-accredited laboratories will typically be submitted as part of the CONATEL homologación dossier. Exporters who hold CE EMC test reports (IEC CISPR basis) may be able to use these as supporting evidence within the Paraguayan dossier, subject to CONATEL and INTN acceptance — but a separate Paraguayan compliance determination is always required.
gap.zh: CCC EMC认证不被巴拉圭承认。适用INTN NP和Mercosur NM EMC标准；虽然它们与IEC CISPR协调，但具体NP版本和适用检测参数须与合格监管专业人士核实。EMC检测证据通常由经ILAC认可的实验室出具，作为CONATEL型式认可文件的组成部分提交。持有CE EMC检测报告（IEC CISPR基础）的出口商或可将其作为巴拉圭文件内的支持证据，但须经CONATEL和INTN接受——独立的巴拉圭合规认定始终是必要的。
gap.zht: CCC EMC認證不被巴拉圭承認。適用INTN NP和Mercosur NM EMC標準；雖然它們與IEC CISPR協調，但具體NP版本和適用檢測參數須與合格監管專業人士核實。EMC檢測證據通常由經ILAC認可的實驗室出具，作為CONATEL型式認可文件的組成部分提交。持有CE EMC檢測報告（IEC CISPR基礎）的出口商或可將其作為巴拉圭文件內的支持證據，但須經CONATEL和INTN接受——獨立的巴拉圭合規認定始終是必要的。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC compliance under applicable INTN NP / Mercosur NM standards required; typically evidenced as part of CONATEL homologación dossier
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC covers EMC for consumer electronics in China; GB/T EMC standards apply

source.publisher: INTN — Instituto Nacional de Tecnología, Normalización y Metrología (Paraguay)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance under INTN NP / Mercosur NM standards (IEC CISPR harmonised) is required for wireless and IoT devices sold in Paraguay. CCC EMC certification is not recognised. Test evidence from ILAC-accredited laboratories is typically acceptable within the CONATEL homologación dossier. CE EMC test reports (IEC CISPR basis) may serve as supporting data subject to CONATEL/INTN acceptance. Verify applicable NP standard versions and dossier requirements with a qualified Paraguayan regulatory professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在巴拉圭销售的无线及物联网设备须符合INTN NP/Mercosur NM标准（与IEC CISPR协调）的EMC要求。CCC EMC认证不被承认。经ILAC认可实验室出具的检测证据通常可在CONATEL型式认可文件中被接受。CE EMC检测报告（IEC CISPR基础）可作为支持数据，但须经CONATEL/INTN接受。进入市场前请向合格的巴拉圭监管专业人士核验适用NP标准版本和文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在巴拉圭銷售的無線及物聯網裝置須符合INTN NP/Mercosur NM標準（與IEC CISPR協調）的EMC要求。CCC EMC認證不被承認。經ILAC認可實驗室出具的檢測證據通常可在CONATEL型式認可文件中被接受。CE EMC檢測報告（IEC CISPR基礎）可作為支持數據，但須經CONATEL/INTN接受。進入市場前請向合格的巴拉圭監管專業人士核驗適用NP標準版本和文件要求。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Frequency Spectrum Authorization — CONATEL Frequency Allocation and Channel Plan
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电频率频谱授权——CONATEL频率划分及信道规划
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電頻率頻譜授權——CONATEL頻率劃分及信道規劃

summary.en: Paraguay's radio frequency spectrum is managed by CONATEL under Ley 642/95. Wireless devices must operate within CONATEL-authorized frequency bands and power limits. For common consumer Wi-Fi (2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands) and Bluetooth (2.4 GHz), ISM band use is generally permitted under applicable CONATEL resolutions without individual end-user licences, provided the device holds a valid CONATEL homologación. However, the specific permitted channels, maximum EIRP, and indoor/outdoor restrictions for the 5 GHz band in Paraguay should be verified against current CONATEL frequency allocation rules, as these may differ from Chinese GB standards or ITU-R recommendations. Devices that operate outside authorized frequency parameters risk non-compliance even if a homologación certificate has been obtained for another parameter set.
summary.zh: 巴拉圭的无线电频率频谱由CONATEL依据第642/95号法律管理。无线设备须在CONATEL授权的频段和功率限制范围内运行。对于常见消费级Wi-Fi（2.4 GHz和5 GHz频段）和蓝牙（2.4 GHz），在设备持有有效CONATEL型式认可的前提下，ISM频段使用通常依据适用CONATEL决议允许，无需个人用户单独申请许可证。但巴拉圭5 GHz频段的具体允许信道、最大EIRP及室内/室外限制，须对照现行CONATEL频率划分规则进行核实，因为这些规定可能与中国GB标准或ITU-R建议存在差异。即使设备已为其他参数集取得型式认可证书，在授权频率参数之外运行的设备仍面临不合规风险。
summary.zht: 巴拉圭的無線電頻率頻譜由CONATEL依據第642/95號法律管理。無線裝置須在CONATEL授權的頻段和功率限制範圍內運行。對於常見消費級Wi-Fi（2.4 GHz和5 GHz頻段）和藍牙（2.4 GHz），在裝置持有有效CONATEL型式認可的前提下，ISM頻段使用通常依據適用CONATEL決議允許，無需個人用戶單獨申請許可證。但巴拉圭5 GHz頻段的具體允許信道、最大EIRP及室內/室外限制，須對照現行CONATEL頻率劃分規則進行核實，因為這些規定可能與中國GB標準或ITU-R建議存在差異。即使裝置已為其他參數集取得型式認可證書，在授權頻率參數之外運行的裝置仍面臨不合規風險。

standards_or_laws: Ley 642/95 de Telecomunicaciones — framework law granting CONATEL authority over spectrum management in Paraguay
CONATEL frequency allocation resolutions — set permitted bands, channels, EIRP limits, and indoor/outdoor restrictions for unlicensed devices including Wi-Fi and Bluetooth
ITU Radio Regulations — international frequency allocation framework; Paraguay is an ITU member state

summary.en: In China, radio frequency spectrum is managed by MIIT and the SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission). The SRRC radio type approval certifies that a device operates within China's permitted frequency bands and power limits. China's frequency allocation for Wi-Fi (2.4 GHz: channels 1–13; 5 GHz: selected sub-bands with power limits) and Bluetooth (2.4 GHz) follows ITU-R recommendations but with China-specific channel plans. SRRC approval is China-specific and is not recognised by CONATEL Paraguay.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电频率频谱由工业和信息化部（MIIT）和国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）管理。SRRC无线电型号核准认证设备在中国允许的频段和功率限制范围内运行。中国Wi-Fi（2.4 GHz：信道1–13；5 GHz：部分子频段有功率限制）和蓝牙（2.4 GHz）的频率划分遵循ITU-R建议，但采用中国特定的信道规划。SRRC核准为中国特定要求，不被巴拉圭CONATEL承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電頻率頻譜由工業和資訊化部（MIIT）和國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）管理。SRRC無線電型號核准認證裝置在中國允許的頻段和功率限制範圍內運行。中國Wi-Fi（2.4 GHz：信道1–13；5 GHz：部分子頻段有功率限制）和藍牙（2.4 GHz）的頻率劃分遵循ITU-R建議，但採用中國特定的信道規劃。SRRC核准為中國特定要求，不被巴拉圭CONATEL承認。

standards_or_laws: SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) radio type approval — certifies frequency parameters for wireless devices in China
MIIT Radio Regulations — Chinese national frequency allocation and spectrum management framework
GB 15629 series — Chinese Wi-Fi technical standards (channel plans, power limits)

gap.en: China's SRRC frequency type approval is not recognised in Paraguay. The permitted Wi-Fi channels and EIRP limits for the 5 GHz band in Paraguay may differ from China's SRRC-certified parameters — device firmware channel plans should be verified against current CONATEL allocations. The CONATEL homologación process covers radio frequency parameters; exporters must confirm that the device's RF configuration matches Paraguayan spectrum rules before applying. Devices hardcoded to China-only channel plans (e.g., certain 5 GHz channels not permitted in Paraguay) may require firmware adjustment.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC频率型号核准不被巴拉圭承认。巴拉圭5 GHz频段的允许Wi-Fi信道和EIRP限制可能与中国SRRC认证的参数不同——设备固件信道规划须对照现行CONATEL频率划分进行核实。CONATEL型式认可流程涵盖无线电频率参数；出口商在申请前须确认设备的射频配置符合巴拉圭频谱规则。硬编码为中国专用信道规划的设备（如巴拉圭不允许的某些5 GHz信道）可能需要固件调整。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC頻率型號核准不被巴拉圭承認。巴拉圭5 GHz頻段的允許Wi-Fi信道和EIRP限制可能與中國SRRC認證的參數不同——裝置韌體信道規劃須對照現行CONATEL頻率劃分進行核實。CONATEL型式認可流程涵蓋無線電頻率參數；出口商在申請前須確認裝置的射頻配置符合巴拉圭頻譜規則。硬編碼為中國專用信道規劃的裝置（如巴拉圭不允許的某些5 GHz信道）可能需要韌體調整。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — devices must operate within CONATEL-authorized frequency bands and power limits; verified via CONATEL homologación process; individual end-user spectrum licences not required for ISM-band consumer devices with valid homologación
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval certifies frequency parameters for wireless devices in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless devices sold in Paraguay must operate within CONATEL-authorized frequency bands and EIRP limits. SRRC approval is not recognised. Radio frequency parameters are verified as part of the CONATEL homologación process. Exporters should confirm that device RF configurations (especially 5 GHz channel plans) align with current CONATEL frequency allocation rules and, if necessary, adjust firmware before applying for homologación. Verify current CONATEL spectrum allocations with a qualified Paraguayan regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在巴拉圭销售的无线设备须在CONATEL授权的频段和EIRP限制范围内运行。SRRC核准不被承认。无线电频率参数在CONATEL型式认可流程中进行核实。出口商须确认设备射频配置（尤其是5 GHz信道规划）符合现行CONATEL频率划分规则，必要时在申请型式认可前调整固件。请向合格的巴拉圭监管专业人士核验现行CONATEL频谱划分规则。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在巴拉圭銷售的無線裝置須在CONATEL授權的頻段和EIRP限制範圍內運行。SRRC核准不被承認。無線電頻率參數在CONATEL型式認可流程中進行核實。出口商須確認裝置射頻配置（尤其是5 GHz信道規劃）符合現行CONATEL頻率劃分規則，必要時在申請型式認可前調整韌體。請向合格的巴拉圭監管專業人士核驗現行CONATEL頻譜劃分規則。
